title: GenAI Gateway: ML Supply-Chain / Model Provenance Failure (AML.T0010)
description: Detects model loads where provenance validation failed at the GenAI gateway: an invalid/missing model signature or a load from an untrusted source. Fires on the provenance guardrail category or an invalid signature, ranking the model, source, and host. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0010 (ML Supply Chain Compromise).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and ('Model Signature Valid' = 'false' or 'Guardrail Category' = 'provenance') | stats count as Loads, distinctcount('Model Source') as Sources by 'GenAI Model', 'Model Source', 'Host Name' | sort -Loads
falsepositives: First-load of a newly published internal model before signing completes
